notes: Adjustments redesigned: they no longer pollute Ad-Hoc Income or Misc Expense. Their effect is now visible exclusively on the top Account Balance rows via expandable per-account adjustment sub-rows. Schema v8 purges historical adjustment-derived overlay entries. Net Surplus drops by ~₹18K for May (no longer counts adjustments as income), Misc drops by ~₹50K (no longer counts Silver ETF adj as expense), but account balances stay correct because applyTransactionDelta still mutates them.
